title: When ALL sub status within group is completed, update status to complete

posts.author: anguyen92 (Angela Nguyen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I have an automation built right now. When a sub status is updated to complete, then update the status to complete.

How would this work if I have more than 1 sub status and I want the status to change to complete when ALL sub status is completed?

image1008×174 8.97 KB

posts.author: LKat (Laura Katterhenry)
posts.cookedHtml:
There’s an automation recipe in the templates section of the Automation center for this!

Go to the Automation center and click on the subitems category and look for this one:

Screenshot 2024-06-24 at 2.22.40 PM798×742 31.2 KB
